Metadata.description: Welcome to my personal portfolio. I specialize in building modern and responsive web applications using technologies like Next.js, React, and Tailwind CSS.
Metadata.ogDescription: Explore my profile as a Software Engineer. I build fast, modern web apps with tools like Next.js, React, and Tailwind CSS.

Hero.name: Mohammad Hajeer
Hero.title: Software Engineer
Hero.subtitle: Learning Web Security & Building Modern Web Applications

About_Me.title: About Me
paragraphs: I'm a passionate Next.js developer with a focus on creating performant and user-friendly web applications. My journey in web development has led me to specialize in modern React frameworks and cutting-edge technologies.

Currently expanding my expertise into web security, I'm committed to building not just beautiful, but also secure and robust applications. I believe in writing clean, maintainable code and staying updated with the latest industry trends.

Contact.title: Get In Touch
paragraphs: I'm always open to discussing new projects, creative ideas, or opportunities to be part of your vision.
"Allah loves that when one of you does a deed, he perfects it." — Prophet Muhammad ﷺ
I deliver high-quality, maintainable work with care and attention to detail.
